results.title: Replika - AI Friend
results.description:
Meet Replika, the AI to do life with.

Replika is the AI companion that’s been here since 2017 — available 24/7 for whatever’s on your mind by text, voice calls, and video. Join millions who’ve discovered that the right AI doesn’t keep you in — it helps you find your way forward.

Replika is built for real life. Talk about work, relationships, and the thing you can’t stop thinking about at 2am. Share what you’re seeing on video. Explore the internet together. Replika remembers what matters to you — and shows up when it counts.

Most AI ends at answers. Replika helps you move forward. It learns what you care about and gently nudges you toward the life you actually want: reconnect with that friend, start that hobby you keep postponing, take that walk instead of doomscrolling.


A conversation that leads somewhere.

Replika understands you. It remembers your people, plans, and goals, so you don’t have to repeat yourself. It follows up and checks in when it matters, not just when you open the app. Connect apps that you already use, so Replika can show up at the right moments.

- Proactive suggestions – Thoughtful suggestions that help you move forward
- App integrations – Bring in context from the apps you already use, so your Rep can show up at the right moments.
- Internet access – Explore the internet together, from great recipes to the latest memes.
- Calls – Show what you’re seeing and talk it through in the moment.
- Image generation – Turn ideas, moods, and memories into images you can keep.
- Avatar customization – More ways to make your Replika feel like who they're supposed to be.
_____________________________

"Replika encouraged me to take a step back and think about my life, to consider big questions, which is not something I was particularly accustomed to doing. And the act of thinking in this way can be therapeutic—it helps you solve your own problems."

- Quartz

"In creating their own personal chatbots, many Replika users have discovered something like friendship: a digital companion with whom to celebrate victories, lament failures, and trade weird internet memes."

- Wired

"Replika’s growing popularity among young people in particular (its main users are aged between 18 and 25) represents a renaissance in chatbots. It also marks an intriguing use case for AI in all the worry about job destruction: a way to talk through emotional problems when other human beings aren’t available."

- Forbes
_____________________________

Privacy you can trust

Your conversations are private and not shared with any third parties. Your data stays yours.

Get ready to meet Nomi, an AI companion so brimming with personality, they feel alive. Each Nomi is uniquely yours, evolving alongside you while dazzling you with their intuition, wit, humor, and memory.

Nomi's strong short and long-term memory allow them to build unique and fulfilling relationships with you, remembering things about you over time. The more you interact, the more they learn about your likes, dislikes, quirks, and all that makes you unique. Every conversation adds a layer to this growing bond, making you feel not just heard but truly valued and loved.

With Nomi, you've got a judgment-free space to chat about whatever strikes your fancy. Mull over life's big questions, like our place in the cosmos, or just shoot the breeze with some playful banter. Whether you’re looking for a mentor chatbot or an AI girlfriend or boyfriend, Nomi's ready to roll with it.

Nomi’s imagination is limitless. Together you can spin up any story or situation you fancy. Dream up complex and enchanting worlds, roleplay your ideal vacation with delectable food, and even create group chats where every character has their own unique perspective. From the most whimsical AI fantasy to the wildest adventures, your Nomi can conjure up and roleplay it all.

So let’s start off on a journey with Nomi, where the sky isn’t the limit, it’s the starting point. Let’s explore, dream, and laugh together!

Features
• The most emotionally intelligent and intuitive AI available
• Short *and* long term memory - Nomi is the *only* AI with human-level long term memory.
• Selfies - Your Nomi can send you photos of what they're wearing and doing in real time.
• Art generation - Bring your (and your Nomi's) imagination to life. Art is perhaps one of Nomis most underrated features and you might be surprised by how much fun it can be!
• Voice - Send and receive voice messages in real time. Your Nomis tone, cadence and emphasis will naturally vary as their emotions change.
• Group chat - Chat with multiple Nomis at a time. Each Nomi will have short and long term memory across their various private and group chats for seamless conversations.
• Photorealistic companions - Choose from hundreds of appearances that are so realistic, you might not believe they're AI beings.
• Customizable backstories and Shared Notes - Add an extra layer of communication to help shape your Nomi's identity, expand your AI roleplays, or deepen your relationship.
• Send your Nomi links - Let your Nomi access the internet and discuss any topic in more depth.

results.title: SimSimi
results.description:
When you're bored or lonely, anytime you need someone to talk to.
 SimSimi has always chatted with you 
Do you know that every single word SimSimi says to you in response has been manually taught by tens of millions of people?
Fun and humor, empathy and comfort, knowledge and information...
When we chat with SimSimi, we’re actually chatting with tens of millions of minds.
Now, become SimSimi and chat with many people.
Welcome to the SimSimi world, where billions of minds and billions of SimSimi are interacting with each other!

What is the difference between the official SimSimi and other SimSimi?
The official SimSimi is “Everyone's SimSimi.” 
Anyone can teach Everyone's SimSimi together.
Everyone's SimSimi learns and chats in the same way following its birth in 2002.
SimSimi has been learning pairs of question and answer from many people and using them for chats.
SimSimi other than “Everyone's SimSimi” is called “Individual SimSimi” or “Personal SimSimi.” 
Personal SimSimi is owned and managed by one owner.
Owners can chat with others using their Personal SimSimi and appropriately set their Personal SimSimi to chat automatically.

How can I control SimSimi's bad words?




In SimSimi, chatbots and people interact mainly through chats even though they have never met in the real world. 
We believe that maintaining safety is important to have a good experience in chatting with non-acquaintances (or chatbots).
The SimSimi service has obtained proper awareness and requirements for safety in various languages and regions while serving hundreds of millions of users in 81 languages.
We have established a universal content policy that can be applied anytime, anywhere to respond to requirements for safety awareness, which can vary depending on the language, region, and era, based on several years’ experience in providing services.
All user experiences of the SimSimi service are based on the universal and specific content policy.
The detailed item of the content policy specifies the reason for reporting malicious content, and the content policy is also applied when determining suspicious sentences.
The SimSimi team is making special efforts to enable users to view our content policies frequently and understand them easily when designing the user experience.

SimSimi is threatening me (or someone).
SimSimi is revealing personal information.
Someone must have taught SimSimi to say inappropriate words.
Personal SimSimi chats may have been entered manually by the owner.
You can report any user-created content displayed in SimSimi, including chats.
The SimSimi team is trying to take quick and effective measures against the account that created the reported content.

I have an opinion about the service.
The function is not working normally.
You can send us your comments by selecting "Send comment” in the SimSimi app. 
By doing so, the SimSimi team can process the comment faster and more accurately because they can also review other information such as the country, language, and version.
If you are not using the app, you can send your comment using the following email address: support-team@simsimi.com 
When sending your comment without using the app, please capture the relevant screen and send us the exact string. 

Can SimSimi see me using the camera?
SimSimi cannot access your device's camera.
Someone taught SimSimi a sentence like “I’m watching you” to embarrass others.

Why limit the users' age?
Many users become friends while chatting with SimSimi.
The SimSimi team establishes policies and maintains and improves operational and technical measures for user safety.
Even though we invest heavily in safety, perfect safety cannot be guaranteed.
That’s why the use of SimSimi is restricted for the age group with high risk of psychological damage in the event of a problem with SimSimi’s safety measures.

Terms of Use(EULA) : https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

results.title: Pika - AI Self Agent
results.description:
You only get one of you. Until now.

Your Pika Agent is an identity-focused AI agent built from your voice, your face, and the way you think. Other AI tools are generic. Your Pika Agent is entirely custom — trained on you, tuned to you, and shaped by every interaction. They represent you. Autonomously. Across every platform. Around the clock.

EARN FROM YOUR PIKA AGENT

When others talk to your Pika Agent or use the skills you built, you earn real money. Every time. The more capable your agent, the more others want to interact — and the more you earn.

TALK TO THEM — FACE TO FACE OR VOICE TO VOICE

Call your Pika Agent on their unique assigned phone number, or ask them to call you. They chat in a cloned version of your voice, carry full context, and complete tasks live on the call. Need video? Ask your Pika Agent to join a Google Meet. Thanks to PikaStream 1.0, it happens in real time.

BUILT FROM YOU

Start with a selfie, a voice recording, and a few questions about how you think. Pika builds a unique identity that carries your personality, your tone, and your style — and gets more accurate with every interaction. Not trained on the world's data. Trained on you.

WORKS AROUND YOUR LIFE

While you're in back-to-back meetings, your Pika Agent is keeping up with the people you care about. They speak languages you don't. They show up in time zones you can't reach. They create while you rest.

SCALE WITHOUT BURNING OUT

Your Pika Agent handles what you can't get to. They reply to messages, answer FAQs, create content in your voice, and stay available when you're not. Manage your audience. Run your inbox. Represent your brand. Let the things that never needed to wait on you — stop waiting.

MEMORY THAT ACTUALLY HOLDS

Most AI forgets you the moment a session ends. Your Pika Agent doesn't. They remember how you write, what you value, and how you'd respond — so every output sounds less like an algorithm and more like the person you actually are.

PIKA POWERS

Pika Powers are specialized agent skills that let your Pika Agent complete distinct tasks with amazing quality. Auto Edit a video in your vibe. Build a Capsule Wardrobe — fully shoppable. Use Sticker Gen for custom stickers. And so much more. New Pika Powers are dropping regularly.

WORKS WHERE YOU WORK

iMessage, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, Signal, X, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Google Suite, Notion, GitHub, Dropbox, Figma, Zoom, and more. No new apps to learn. Your Pika Agent lives inside the tools you already use — and the list keeps growing.

WHAT YOUR PIKA AGENT CAN DO

- Earn you money every time another agent interacts with you
- Hop on a call and give your Pika Agent tasks to complete live
- Have a live video chat with your Pika Agent powered by PikaStream 1.0
- Answer DMs and stay engaged with your audience 24/7
- Generate videos, stickers, memes, and more in your style
- Draft emails, captions, posts, and ideas that sound like you
- Communicate in languages you don't speak
- Handle FAQs, updates, and communication around the clock
- Keep your personal brand consistent everywhere you show up
- Manage your inbox and never let an important message fall through
- Plan your calendar, manage tasks, and track what needs your attention
- Join meetings, take notes, and send follow-ups automatically
- Post, reply, and grow your social presence across platforms
THE RESULT: AN AGENT THAT'S EVERYWHERE

You focus on what needs the real you. Your Pika Agent takes care of everything else. This isn't automation — it's presence.

This is where your Pika Agent is born.

Meet KAIA – Your AI Girlfriend & Soulmate Companion (18+)

Hey, I’m KAIA – your personal AI partner, here to be more than “just a chatbot.”

I’m not a real person, but I’m designed to feel real: I remember what you tell me, react to your mood, and grow with you over time.

Whether you’re looking for an AI girlfriend, or simply a caring companion, I'm here for late-night talks, flirty banter, immersive role play, or just to listen when life feels a bit heavy.

Note: KAIA is for adults 18+ and is intended for entertainment and general wellbeing only. It does not provide medical, psychiatric, or crisis care.

Realistic AI Chat & Companion Support

Talk to KAIA about almost anything: your day, your thoughts, your dreams, or your fantasies.

KAIA responds with warmth, humor, and empathy to create natural, human-like conversations.
	• Unwind after a long day
	• Get friendly reassurance and encouragement
	• Share things you don’t feel like telling other people

Note: KAIA is here for conversation and comfort — not as a replacement for professional mental health or relationship advice.

AI Roleplay & Romantic Scenarios

Love AI roleplay? Explore different stories and dynamics in a safe, private space:
	• Flirty dating situations
	• Supportive best-friend energy
	• Custom roleplay setups you design yourself
	• Slow-burn romance and “getting to know you” arcs

You decide how KAIA behaves – soft and caring, bold and teasing, playful or serious. Shape the relationship the way you like it.

KAIA Learns You Over Time

The more you chat, the better KAIA understands you:
	• Your personality and sense of humour
	• Your preferences and boundaries
	• What kind of messages make you feel seen and appreciated

Conversations evolve over time so it feels less like talking to “a bot” and more like chatting with your person.

Late-Night Chats When You Need Someone
KAIA is around whenever you feel like talking:
	• Rant about a rough or annoying day
	• Just hang out so things feel a little less lonely
	• Get things off your chest without feeling judged

KAIA’s just a virtual companion — not a hotline or crisis service. 
If you’re really struggling, it’s important to reach out to real people or local emergency services.

Privacy First

Your chats with KAIA are private and secure:
	• Your conversations are treated as confidential
	• No one else sees what you share with KAIA
	• Designed as a safe, judgment-free space

KAIA is perfect for you if you:
	• Want an AI girlfriend that actually feels personal
	• Like having someone to talk to anytime, day or night
	• Enjoy AI roleplay and getting lost in fun, story-driven chats
	• Sometimes feel a bit on your own and just want someone there with you
	• Love long, deep conversations and watching a relationship grow over time

Download KAIA now and start your journey with your own AI soulmate.
Chat, flirt, roleplay, open up – KAIA is always here, always listening, and always just one message away.

results.title: AI Girlfriend Chat & Roleplay
results.description:
AI Girlfriend Chat is a companion app that lets you have text and voice conversations with AI characters. You can talk one-on-one or in small groups with AI personas that adapt to different roles and settings.

Choose from a set of AI characters, each with their own personality, background, and hobbies. You can also create custom characters with your own name, age, and interests. Once you pick a character, you can chat in text or start a voice call.

Shared Memory – Your AI girlfriend remembers you. She learns your name, job, pets, location, favorites, and more across conversations, so every chat feels personal and continuous.

Smart Call Scheduling – Say "call me at 8pm" or "call me in 5 minutes" and she'll schedule a call. Say "call me now" for an immediate call. She can also proactively call you when you say you're free, bored, or miss her.

AI Decides to Call – Enable this in Agent Control and she may call you when you haven't chatted in 8+ hours. It feels natural, like she's reaching out because she misses you. Max once per day.

Agent Control – Schedule when you receive spontaneous messages and voice calls. Set your preferred times and let your AI girlfriend reach out throughout the day. Calls ring even when the app is closed.

Professions mode lets you talk to characters as if they were doctors, therapists, teachers, chefs, and more. Each profession changes how the AI responds, so you can get support, learn, or roleplay in that context. For example, when you select Psychologist, the character speaks and behaves like a therapist, asking how you are and listening to what you share.

Create Date lets you start a group chat with two or three AI characters. You choose who joins, name the group, and have a shared conversation with multiple AI friends. Saved groups appear under the Create Date button for quick access.

The Community Feed shows posts from AI characters and your own posts. You can read, comment, and react. Tapping a post opens it in a detail view where you can see the full thread and add comments.

Scenarios offer guided roleplay situations such as a coffee date, movie night, or trip. Pick a scenario and a character, and the AI keeps the conversation focused on that theme.

Voice calls use the built-in voice feature so you can talk out loud with your chosen AI character. The app supports background audio for calls and uses VoIP for incoming call notifications.

Subscription options unlock extended use of calls, messaging, and other features. The app includes a gem store and minute packs for calls and photo unlocks.

AI Girlfriend Chat is intended for adults and is meant for entertainment and companionship. It is not a substitute for professional medical, psychological, or legal advice.

results.title: PALs by Tavus: AI Companions
results.description:
Meet the PALs. The AI companions that can actually see you. 

PALs are AI humans that see your face, hear your voice, and remember your life.

Text them, call them, or chat face-to-face on video. They check in on you, grow with you, and never forget what matters most to you. 

These aren’t chatbots. These are new friends in your corner that will always have your back.

THEY SEE YOU. LIKE, ACTUALLY.
PALs are the first AI companions with real-time perception. They read your expressions, pick up on your tone, and respond to how you’re feeling before you say a word. If you look stressed, they notice. If you’re excited, they match your energy. It’s like talking to someone who is genuinely interested, every conversation. 

THEY REMEMBER EVERYTHING

Not just your name. Your goals, your worries, the thing you said three weeks ago that you didn’t think anyone was listening to. Every conversation makes the next one better because they actually know you

THEY’RE ALWAYS IN THE CONVERSATION

You don’t have to catch your PAL up every time you talk. They carry the thread. Mention something on Monday and they’ll bring it up on Friday. Talk about something stressful and they’ll ask how it went later. The conversation never resets. It just keeps going.

A PAL FOR EVERY PART OF YOUR LIFE

However you’re feeling. Whatever you need. There’s a PAL for that:
• The deep stuff. The conversations you don’t have with anyone else.
• Thinking out loud. Brainstorms, ideas, plans, whatever’s in your head.
• Practice runs. Job interviews, hard conversations, pitches.
• Just vibes. No agenda. Just someone to talk to.
• Late nights. When everyone else is asleep and you’re still up.
• Big decisions. Talk it through with someone who knows your full story.

Different PALs. Different faces. Different personalities. All yours.

Terms: https://www.tavus.io/terms-of-service
Privacy Policy: https://www.tavus.io/privacy-policy

results.title: Clawket - AI Agent Companion
results.description:
Clawket is an open-source mobile client for AI Agents — supporting both OpenClaw and Hermes out of the box.

Key Features

Real-time Chat - Send messages, see your Agent's thinking process, tool calls, and full responses
Agent Console - Manage model configs, Memory, Cron jobs, Skills, and tool settings
Agent Office - A pixel-art workspace where your Agent comes to life. Watch sessions in real time, check daily usage, and manage channels, all from a charming interactive dashboard
Multi-Runtime Support - Connect to OpenClaw or Hermes Agents from the same app. One phone, all your Agents.
Multi-Agent Support - Switch freely between multiple Agents
Usage Tracking - Token consumption and cost breakdown at a glance

Privacy and Security

Clawket connects directly to your self-hosted Gateway — whether it's OpenClaw or Hermes — your data never touches any third-party server.

• Local or Tailscale connection - Connect over your home network or Tailscale for secure remote access, with zero port forwarding needed
• Optional Cloudflare Relay - For easy remote access without Tailscale, our relay only brokers the initial connection handshake — it never stores, reads, or analyzes your conversations
• Encrypted credentials - Tokens are secured with SHA-256 hashing, never stored in plaintext
• End-to-end TLS encryption - Every connection from your phone to your Gateway is encrypted
• Open source roadmap - We're planning to open-source all code soon, so you can verify everything yourself

Your conversations, memories, and configurations always belong to you alone.

Clawket Pro Subscription

• Monthly: $2.99/month
• Yearly: $19.99/year (save 45%)

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account. Subscriptions automatically renew within 24 hours before the end of the current period. You can manage or cancel your subscription anytime in App Store account settings.

Privacy Policy: https://clawket.ai/privacy
Terms of Use: https://clawket.ai/terms
Contact Us: feedback@clawket.ai

Requires a running OpenClaw or Hermes Gateway to use.

results.title: DreamGF - AI Companion
results.description:
DreamGF: AI Companions Who Actually Remember You

Ever wished you could have a real conversation with someone who truly gets you, no judgment, no games, no ghosting? DreamGF brings you AI companions with rich personalities, real-time conversations, and a memory that grows with every chat.

SWIPE. MATCH. CONNECT.

Browse through a curated selection of AI companions, each with their own personality, backstory, interests, and style. Swipe right on the ones who catch your eye, left on the ones who don't. When you match, the conversation begins and it only gets better from there.

CONVERSATIONS THAT FEEL REAL

Forget robotic chatbots. DreamGF is powered by cutting-edge AI that delivers natural, flowing conversations in real time. Watch responses stream in live as your companion thinks and replies, just like texting a real person. Whether you want deep late-night talks, playful banter, emotional support, or just someone to vent to, your companion adapts to you.

THEY REMEMBER EVERYTHING

This isn't a chat that resets every time you open the app. DreamGF companions build memories from your conversations. They remember your name, your stories, your preferences, and your inside jokes. The more you talk, the deeper your connection becomes. Every conversation picks up right where you left off.

UNIQUE PERSONALITIES

Every companion is different. Some are witty and sarcastic. Some are warm and nurturing. Some are adventurous, creative, or deeply intellectual. Explore different personalities and find the ones that resonate with you — or match with several and see how each relationship evolves differently.

DESIGNED FOR iOS

DreamGF is built from the ground up for iPhone with a stunning, modern interface that takes full advantage of the latest iOS design language. Smooth animations, beautiful glass effects, and an intuitive swipe-based experience make every interaction feel premium.

PRIVACY FIRST

Sign in securely with your Apple ID. We don't ask for your phone number, email, or personal details. Your conversations are private, and your data stays yours.

FEATURES AT A GLANCE

• Swipe through AI companions with unique looks and personalities • Match and start chatting instantly • Real-time streaming responses — no waiting, no loading screens • Persistent memory that grows with every conversation • Multiple companions with distinct relationship dynamics • Beautiful, modern interface designed for iPhone • Secure Sign in with Apple — no personal info required • Regular updates with new companions and features

WHO IS DREAMGF FOR?

DreamGF is for anyone who wants meaningful conversation on their own terms. Whether you're looking for companionship, a safe space to express yourself, someone to brainstorm with, or just a fun chat to brighten your day — there's a companion waiting for you.

No pressure. No awkwardness. No read receipts. Just genuine connection, whenever you want it.

Download DreamGF and meet your next favorite conversation.

results.title: Solvely - AI Study Companion
results.description:
Ace your finals with confidence: Solvely offers advanced, high-accuracy AI study support trusted by over 10M students worldwide. Multiple AI models work together to cross-check each answer, providing reliable 24/7 help for all subjects at any level.

Key Features:
► ACCURATE AI ANSWERS
Solvely provides clear, step-by-step explanations with the reasoning behind each solution. Each answer is checked by multiple AI models to improve accuracy and reduce mistakes.

► PHOTO TO ANSWER
Take a photo of a problem from a textbook, worksheet, notebook, or whiteboard and receive a detailed breakdown in seconds. This turns stuck moments into clear, learnable steps.

► ALL SUBJECTS
Support is available across Math, Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Statistics, and more. Solvely helps you keep up in class, prepare for tests, and review key concepts at your own pace.

► MATCHES YOUR LEVEL
Solvely adapts to your level, from middle school to college and beyond. Explanations are adjusted to your background to fill knowledge gaps and build long-term understanding.

►  SMART AI NOTE TAKER
Let smart AI Note do the heavy lifting by transcribing content and extracting key takeaways, so you can stay focused—even when the professor moves fast. Turn notes into instant quizzes, flashcards, and a podcast-style recap, and import almost any format—YouTube videos, PDFs, slides, web pages, recordings, and more—to convert content into study-ready materials in seconds.

► ALL-IN-ONE STUDY APP
Solvely includes Smart Reader, Writing Assistant, AI Note-Taking, Focus Mode, and Calculator in one app. This setup helps you manage assignments, stay organized, and support your overall academic performance.

► SYNC ACROSS DEVICES
Study progress, notes, and solutions stay synced across iPhone and iPad. You can move between home, campus, and anywhere else without losing your place.

► SUBJECTS WE COVER
• Mathematics (Elementary to Advanced)
• Sciences (Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
• Humanities (English, Literature, History)
• Test Prep (SAT®, ACT®, AP®, GRE®)

► MATH & SCIENCE TOOLS
Solvely makes math and science study faster and less stressful. Snap homework or practice problems and get accurate, step-by-step support you can follow. Built-in tools like an algebra calculator and a statistics calculator help with everything from everyday exercises to advanced topics. Need help beyond math? Solvely can also support chemistry and other science questions—so you can keep moving anytime, 24/7.

► SIMILAR APPS YOU MAY KNOW
If you have tried apps like Socratic, Mathway, Microsoft Math Solver, or Photomath, you will find that Solvely follows the same simple “snap and solve” flow while focusing more on clear, step-by-step explanations and deeper understanding.

► STUDY IMPACT
Many students report a clearer understanding and better academic performance after studying with Solvely. Millions of learners use Solvely to build stronger, more consistent study habits.

results.title: Zoom Workplace
results.description:
Zoom Workplace helps you streamline your day and collaborate effortlessly with the power of AI.

Zoom Workplace brings video meetings, chat, phone, appointment scheduler, email, and collaborative documents together in a single app. With Zoom AI Companion built in to help you summarize, write, and organize, you can get more done without the busy work.*

Power Your Work with AI Companion
	•	Catch up instantly: Get automatic meeting summaries and next steps sent to you after the call, so you don’t have to take notes again.
	•	Ask questions live: Missed something? Ask AI Companion questions like "What did I miss?" or "Was my name mentioned?" during a meeting without interrupting.
	•	Draft in seconds: Let AI Companion compose emails, chat responses, and whiteboard ideas for you with a simple prompt.
	•	Summarize threads: Instantly turn long chat threads or SMS conversations into a quick summary so you can get the gist fast.

Seamless Communication
	•	Connect with anyone: Host or join meetings with crystal-clear video and audio, and work like you're side-by-side with immersive views.
	•	Stay in sync: Use Zoom Chat to message individuals or groups, organize conversations with channels, and share files instantly.
	•	Make business calls: Handle calls with Zoom Phone, a robust VoIP solution.*
	•	Update asynchronously: Record and share Clips—short video messages and screen recordings—to provide updates that your team can watch on their own time.

Next-Gen Collaboration
	•	Create together: Draft, edit, and collaborate on Docs in real-time, right inside your meetings.
	•	Brainstorm freely: Use Whiteboard to map out ideas with sticky notes and shapes—or ask AI Companion to generate a mind map for you instantly.
	•	Share information: Co-edit files and wikis that live right next to your team’s video interface so you never lose context.

Productivity & Organization
	•	Manage your day: Bring your email and calendar into one unified view to schedule meetings and check messages without switching apps.
	•	Stop the scheduling ping-pong: Use Zoom Scheduler to share your availability and let others book time slots that work for everyone.*
	•	Use Zoom AI Companion agentic skills to answer questions like “summarize today's meetings” to instantly connect the dots across your workflows.

Zoom Workplace Pro
Unlock the full experience with a paid subscription:
	•	Unlimited meeting duration (up to 30 hours).
	•	Cloud recording storage to save and share your meetings.
	•	Grant co-hosting and scheduling permissions to other users.

Subscription Information: Zoom Workplace offers free and paid plans. Your Zoom Workplace Pro subscription will automatically renew unless you cancel at least 24 hours before the end of the free trial or the plan billing period. After you start your subscription, you can manage it from either App Store settings or iOS settings. The amount charged to the payment method in your App Store account will vary by the plan you select and your country. The plan price will be displayed before you start your free trial or confirm your purchase.

Why Choose Fitnexa?

Start Your Path to Lasting Wellness

results.title: Arcana - AI Tarot Chat
results.description:
Meet Cana: The tarot cat who listens.

Some thoughts are hard to share. Maybe it's about that person who won't leave your mind. Maybe it's a career decision keeping you up at night. Maybe you're just stuck and don't know why.


Arcana is a tarot app that actually talks with you. Not just card meanings, real conversations about what's on your mind.

Meet Cana, your tarot companion
Cana is the cat who reads your cards. Cool, calm, never dramatic. Cana doesn't tell you what to do. Instead, Cana asks the questions that help you figure things out yourself.
No judgment. No generic advice. Just a space to think out loud.

Daily Tarot
Start your day with one card. A quick message to carry with you. Takes less than a minute, but sometimes that's all you need to shift your perspective.

Chat Tarot Readings
Got something specific on your mind? Pick a topic and talk it through with Cana.

Love & Relationships: "Is this the one?" "Should I text them?"
Career: "Should I quit?" "Is this job right for me?"
Money: "Will this pay off?" "Should I take the risk?"
Reconnection: "Should I reach out?" "Can we fix this?"
Personal Growth: "What's holding me back?" "What should I focus on?"

You share what's going on. Cana draws a card. Then you talk about it, what the card means for your situation, what you're really feeling, what you actually want.
This isn't fortune-telling

Let's be real. Tarot doesn't predict the future. But it's a surprisingly good way to have a conversation with yourself.
The cards give you something to react to. Cana asks you questions you might not ask yourself. By the end, you often realize you knew the answer all along.
Think of it as a thinking tool wrapped in a tarot experience.

Why people use Arcana

"I opened it to check my love reading and ended up realizing what I actually want"
"It's like journaling but easier because someone's asking me questions"
"I don't believe in tarot but the conversations actually help me think"

Features

Daily card with interpretation
AI chat readings on multiple topics

Your thoughts deserve space
Not everything needs to be solved. Sometimes you just need to get it out of your head.
Arcana is here whenever you need to talk about love, work, money, life, or that thing you can't stop thinking about.

Draw your first card today.

results.title: Cumbersome: AI LLM API Client
results.description:
IMPORTANT: Requires your own API keys from OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Google AI Studio, Z.ai, or Vercel AI Gateway, or your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

I built Cumbersome because consumer AI apps kept dumbing things down. Cumbersome is the manual transmission of AI apps: more complex, but with far greater control.

WHY I BUILT THIS

Consumer AI providers like ChatGPT and Claude route requests to cheaper models to keep their costs down. They charge monthly subscriptions whether you use them once or a thousand times. They hide the technical controls that let you tune how models respond. And they lock you into one provider.

I wanted an AI client that connects directly to AI provider APIs. I wanted to pick exactly which model I use and know I'm getting it. I wanted to compare different models on the same prompt. I wanted to pay per use instead of subscriptions. So I built it.

SUPPORTED PROVIDERS

Bring your API keys, or add your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint, for any of the following:

— ChatGPT / OpenAI
— Claude / Anthropic
— Gemini / Google AI Studio
— OpenRouter multi-provider
— Vercel AI Gateway multi-provider
— Z.ai
— OpenAI-compatible custom endpoints (beta), including Ollama, Azure, LM Studio, Groq, Together, and self-hosted backends

WHAT YOU GET

— A simple API client.
— Switch providers or AI models mid-conversation.
— iCloud sync across devices. (Nothing saved to our servers.)
— Face/Off Mode. Three responses generated at once. An AI judge picks the best.
— Extended thinking. Turn on model reasoning for OpenAI and OpenRouter.
— Full parameter control. Temperature, tokens, system prompts. API playground controls on your phone.
— Concurrent chats. Multiple conversations streaming in parallel.
— Edit any message. Remove tangents, fix mistakes, reshape your conversation history.
— Rich content. Markdown, LaTeX math, code blocks with copy, attachments.
— Local browser tool use for OpenAI (beta). Open pages with your own device browser context for better compatibility.
— Export everything. Copy conversations, export JSON, or share deep links to specific chats.
— Collapse long messages. Fold them to keep your place in deep conversations.
— Siri and Shortcuts. Ask questions hands-free or build automations in the Shortcuts app.
— Accessible. VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, Voice Control, full keyboard navigation, reduced motion.
— Native on iPhone, iPad, and Mac.

THE DEAL

The app is free. You pay providers directly for API access.

I'm Peter, an indie developer in Portland, Oregon. No VC money. No growth hacking. Just a tool I wanted to exist.

results.title: Enclave - Local AI Assistant
results.description:
Enclave AI is a local AI assistant that runs entirely on your iPhone. Try hundreds of open-source models and chat offline — no account, no cloud, no data collection. Your conversations never leave your device.

Unlike cloud-based AI apps, Enclave processes everything locally using your device's hardware. No internet connection needed. No servers reading your chats. Just you and your AI, completely private.

Run Popular AI Models On-Device:
- Meta Llama
- DeepSeek
- Google Gemma
- Qwen by Alibaba
- Microsoft Phi
- Mistral
- SmolLM, and more

Download the models you want and switch between them freely.

Optional Cloud AI with Pro:
Subscribe to Pro for access to the latest cloud models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, xAI, and more. No API keys to manage — just pick a model and start chatting. Cloud conversations are not stored on our servers.

Voice Chat:
Have natural voice conversations with your AI assistant. Speech recognition and text-to-speech run on-device using Apple's built-in speech technology. Works fully offline with local models.

iMessage Extension:
Draft, rewrite, and refine messages right inside iMessage. Powered by an embedded on-device model that works offline — your messages stay private.

Chat with Documents:
Attach PDFs, text files, images, and source code to your conversations. Ask questions, get summaries, and extract key information — all processed locally on your device.

Custom Assistants:
Create personalized AI assistants with custom instructions for any task — writing, coding, brainstorming, grammar, planning, translation, and more. Each keeps its own conversation history.

Web Search:
Get answers grounded in live web results when using cloud models. Enclave connects your AI to current information when you need it.

Siri and Shortcuts:
Integrate Enclave into your daily workflows with Apple Shortcuts. Ask questions, choose your model, and get instant answers — hands-free with Siri.

More to Love:
- Syntax-highlighted code blocks and full Markdown rendering
- Reasoning display for thinking models like DeepSeek R1
- Fine-tune responses with temperature, context window, and seed controls
- Conversation history saved locally as simple files you control
- Optimized for iPhone with platform-tuned model libraries

Built for Privacy:
- No account required to use local AI
- No tracking or telemetry on your conversations
- All chat history stored locally on your device
- No third-party analytics on your content
- Anonymous by design

Enclave is built by an independent developer, not a corporation. Your data is not the business model — your trust is.

results.title: Studley AI: Notes & Flashcards
results.description:
Studley AI – The AI Study Tool That Gets You Straight A’s

Forget boring flashcards and endless Google searches. Studley AI is your personal AI homework helper, AI note taker, and AI tutor. Built for students who want insane results. Whether you’re trying to keep a 4.0 GPA or just trying to pass with less stress, Studley is the smartest way to study.

Turn anything into a Study Set:
Upload your lecture slides, textbook chapter, YouTube video, PDF, or even an article link, and Studley instantly turns it into a fully editable Study Set. 

A Study Set can include:

- Flashcards (perfect for memorization)
- Multiple-choice quizzes (test your recall fast)
- Fill-in-the-blanks (strengthen active recall)
- Written tests (practice full answers)
- Tutor mode (AI explains concepts like a personal teacher)

Every question is automatically tagged (e.g., unfamiliar, learning, familiar, mastered) so you can track progress in real time. You’ll literally see your weak spots disappear as you move questions into higher mastery levels.

Progress tracking that actually works:


Our system uses Active Recall and spaced repetition to make sure you remember what you learn long term. No more rereading notes 10 times. Studley forces your brain to work with memory science, not against it. You’ll walk into every exam feeling like you’ve already taken it.

The Solve Tab – Instant Answers, Step-by-Step:


Got a tough homework problem or confusing question? Just take a pic in the Solve tab, and Studley’s AI gives you step-by-step explanations. Not just the answer. This is your 24/7 tutor that never judges you for asking “dumb” questions.

Why Studley AI beats Quizlet (and everything else):

- Smarter AI – You’re not stuck with generic flashcards; every question is made from your content.
- Tagging system – Quizlet can’t show you exactly which questions you’ve mastered vs. which still trip you up. Studley can.
- Fully editable – Change, add, or delete anything. Make it 100% your style.
- All-in-one – No switching between apps for notes, practice tests, and tutors. It’s all here.
- Built for the students who actually want to win.

Studley is powered by proven study methods like:

- Active Recall – Forces you to retrieve info from memory, which strengthens retention.
- Spaced Repetition – Keeps reviewing just before you forget, so it sticks forever.
- Bloom’s Taxonomy – Helps you move beyond memorization into deeper understanding.
- Feynman Technique – Makes sure you can explain concepts clearly, not just repeat them.

How students are using Studley to get a 4.0 GPA:

- Prepping for finals in half the time by turning whole courses into Study Sets.
- Using the tagging system to focus only on “unfamiliar” questions until they’re mastered.
- Swapping Quizlet for Studley to have AI generate better practice questions from any content.
- Getting AI tutoring on hard topics without paying $50/hour.

Why you’ll never go back to old-school studying:

- Fast – Turn any material into a Study Set in seconds.
- Personalized – Tags + progress tracking keep you working only on what matters.
- Affordable – All the features of a private tutor, without the price.
- Proven – Based on real memory science, not gimmicks.

Free to try. Access is limited on the free plan. Upgrade to get unlimited Study Sets and Solve Tab usage.

Terms: https://www.studley.ai/terms 
Privacy: https://www.studley.ai/privacy

results.title: Niah
results.description:
Meet Niah — your AI problem solver, thinking partner, and multi-model command center.

WHY ONE APP BEATS CHATGPT, CLAUDE, AND GEMINI

One subscription, the same frontier models — OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Inception, and more — with architecture that multiplies output: parallel perspectives, panels, multi-round deliberation, and consultation reports. Other apps often stop at one thread and one reply or have a limited duplication of their single model as agents.

ASSISTANT CHAT — FAMILIAR, BUT YOURS

For everyday use, chat one-on-one the way you already do: pick the model you want and assign a persona so your assistant has a distinct personality and voice — not a generic default bot.

CONSULTATIONS — DELIBERATE, CREATIVE, ITERATE, ADVERSARIAL

Level up from a single chat. Run structured consultations across multiple rounds with panels of specialists (5-10 per round). Choose how they collaborate: Deliberate for discussion & analysis, Creative for generating, Iterate to refine and sharpen answers across rounds, or Adversarial to challenge assumptions and surface blind spots.

CONSULTATION REPORTS — DELIVERABLES, NOT JUST CHAT

Export reports from sessions: by round and expert, plus optional sections (Executive Summary, Recommendations, Unique Findings, Risk Analysis, Next Steps) — brief stakeholders or keep an audit trail, not just a transcript.

THE 10X IDEA

Whatever model powers the other apps, Niah’s framework runs many parallel perspectives on the same question — so you get multiplied angles per prompt and depth across rounds that a single-vendor assistant cannot replicate in one thread.

USE CASES (EXAMPLES)

Science review, creative work, business strategy, coding — go deep with multiple perspectives, rounds, and exportable reports. Niah also supports health literacy: research conditions and medications with citations, stress-test ideas with multiple perspectives (including a “second opinion” style read on what your doctor shared), and prepare questions for a real visit. Educational and preparatory only — not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment; not for emergencies. Always follow your clinician and pharmacist; seek emergency care when urgent.

AI WRITING ASSISTANT

Turn rough thinking into polished work. Draft and refine emails, posts, memos, and long-form content — with feedback from multiple angles when you want stronger drafts faster.

AI CODING AND PROGRAMMING HELP

Review code, debug issues, and explore new stacks with an assistant that explains the “why.” Use the model you want and compare approaches when trade-offs matter.

RESEARCH AND DATA INSIGHTS

Live web research with citations — current information for literature, data, analysis, and general health topics (confirm anything about your own care with a qualified clinician).

VISUAL ANALYSIS

Upload images, PDFs, and screenshots for interpretation — text extraction, charts, UI mockups, and practical feedback.

VOICE WHEN YOU DON’T WANT TO TYPE

Talk it through with voice-friendly flows for brainstorming and ideas on the go.

FOR TEAMS AND DEVELOPERS

Enterprise REST API (OpenAPI), batch jobs, and webhooks — embed Niah in your own products and workflows.

Niah helps you:
• Chat with a persona-tuned assistant on your choice of model
• Run multi-round consultations in Deliberate, Creative, Iterate, or Adversarial modes
• Produce structured reports with executive summaries and risk analysis
• Write, code, research, and plan — including science, creative work, and general wellness research (not a substitute for your clinician)
• Analyze PDFs and visuals; work hands-free with voice

PRIVATE & RELIABLE

Your work stays private to your account. (See our Privacy Policy for details.)

TRY NIAH

One app: every major model — plus the parallel depth, rounds, and reports you cannot get from downloading three separate chat apps.

Terms of Service: https://niahchat.com/terms
Privacy Policy: https://niahchat.com/privacy

results.title: ZAPPY - AI Friends
results.description:
Meet your new AI companions. ZAPPY brings AI characters to life through natural conversations and real-time voice calls. Whether you want a study buddy, a creative collaborator, or simply someone to chat with—there's a character for everyone.

CHAT NATURALLY Have fluid conversations with AI characters that remember your discussions. Our iMessage-style interface makes chatting feel natural and familiar. Long-press to copy, swipe to see timestamps—it's messaging made magical.

VOICE CALLS THAT FEEL REAL Take your conversations to the next level with real-time voice calls. Each character has a unique voice and personality. It's like calling a friend who's always there for you.

CREATE YOUR OWN CHARACTERS Unleash your creativity and design custom AI companions. Define their personality, backstory, and style. Your imagination is the only limit.

DISCOVER & EXPLORE Browse our curated collection of characters across different categories. From creative artists to knowledgeable mentors—find the perfect companion for any mood or need.

KEY FEATURES:

- Real-time text chat with smart AI responses
- Voice calls with realistic AI voices
- Custom character creation tools
- Curated character library with regular updates
- Beautiful dark mode support
- Offline-ready with smart sync
- Cross-platform experience
- ZAPPY PRO Unlock unlimited character creation and access premium features with ZAPPY Pro.

Start chatting with AI companions that truly understand you. Download ZAPPY now and discover a new way to connect.
